query: scratched dusty old photograph damaged film emulsion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: scratched, dusty, damaged emulsion textures

response.objective_caption: Black-and-white close-up photograph of weathered rock surfaces, showing angular stone formations with deep crevices and contrasting light and shadow across textured mineral planes.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Heavily grainy black-and-white close-up of weathered rock surfaces with deep crevices and contrasting light and shadow, rendered with coarse analog film grain and low resolution that obscures fine geological detail into ambiguous texture, approaching abstraction through the fragmented mineral planes and indistinct edges.
